description: Platform UX overhaul: profile photo upload, sessions calendar view with urgency indicators, availability overrides and multi-slot days, client management portal, messaging improvements, role switching for coaches, manual reminder button

userStories.title: Add profile photo upload with compression
userStories.description: As a coach, I want to upload a profile photo directly instead of pasting a URL, with automatic compression.
acceptanceCriteria: Add file input to profile editor form that accepts image files (jpg, png, webp)
Compress/resize image client-side before upload (max 500KB, max 800x800px) using canvas API
Create API route POST /api/upload/avatar that uploads to Supabase Storage and returns public URL
Show preview of uploaded photo in the profile editor
Save the returned URL to coachProfiles.profilePhotoUrl or users.avatarUrl
Show current photo if one exists, with option to change
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Use Supabase Storage (already configured). Check if an avatars bucket exists, create if not.

userStories.title: Improve profile page layout and UX
userStories.description: As a coach, I want a cleaner profile editing experience with better visual hierarchy.
acceptanceCriteria: Reorganize profile form into clear sections with card containers: Photo & Identity, About, Session Types, Settings
Photo section shows large circular preview of current photo with upload overlay
Add profile completion progress bar at the top
Add 'Preview Public Profile' button that opens coach's public page in new tab
Session types section has clearer add/edit/remove UI
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Coach slug is at coachProfiles.slug. Public profile at /coaches/{slug}.

userStories.title: Add urgency border colors to session cards
userStories.description: As a coach, I want to see at a glance which sessions are most urgent based on colored borders.
acceptanceCriteria: Session cards get left border color based on time proximity: red if within 2 hours, orange if today, yellow if tomorrow, emerald if within 7 days, default border otherwise
Apply to both coach session-card.tsx and client-session-card.tsx
Apply to upcoming sessions widgets on dashboard (todays-schedule, upcoming-sessions-widget, client-upcoming-sessions)
Show date and day-of-week clearly on each card
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Session card components are in src/components/sessions/. Dashboard widgets in src/components/dashboard/.

userStories.title: Fix sessions page tabs to show correct data
userStories.description: As a coach, I want the upcoming/past/cancelled tabs on the sessions page to show distinct, correct data.
acceptanceCriteria: Upcoming tab: only future confirmed/pending sessions, sorted by soonest first
Past tab: only sessions where endTime has passed AND status is completed/confirmed/no_show, sorted by most recent first
Cancelled tab: only sessions with status cancelled, sorted by most recent first
Each tab shows count badge with number of items
Empty states are different per tab with relevant messaging
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Check getCoachSessions in sessions/actions.ts. Verify the SQL queries filter correctly.

userStories.title: Add calendar view toggle to sessions page
userStories.description: As a coach, I want to switch between list view and calendar view on the sessions page.
acceptanceCriteria: Add toggle button group (List / Calendar) above the sessions list
Calendar view reuses the existing CalendarView component from dashboard
Calendar shows all sessions (not just upcoming), color-coded by status
Clicking a day in calendar shows that day's sessions in a list below
Selected day shows full session cards (not just dots)
Toggle state persists via URL search param (?view=calendar or ?view=list)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: CalendarView is at src/components/dashboard/calendar-view.tsx. It uses getSessionsForMonth from dashboard/actions.ts.

userStories.title: Improve dashboard calendar - click day for session list
userStories.description: As a coach, I want to click on a calendar day to see a full list of sessions for that day instead of just hovering.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a day on the dashboard calendar selects it and shows a session list panel below
Selected day is visually highlighted (filled background, not just ring)
Session list shows full details: client name, time, session type, status badge, join button
If no sessions on selected day, show 'No sessions' message
Calendar dots use urgency colors (same scheme as session cards)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: CalendarView at src/components/dashboard/calendar-view.tsx is already a client component with click handling.

userStories.title: Add manual reminder button for upcoming sessions
userStories.description: As a coach, I want to send a manual reminder message to a client for an upcoming session.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Send Reminder' button on each upcoming session card (coach view only)
Button creates a system message in the conversation: 'Reminder: You have a {sessionType} session on {date} at {time}'
Button shows loading state while sending
Button shows 'Sent' with checkmark after success, disabled for 1 hour
Create server action sendSessionReminder(bookingId) in sessions/actions.ts
Action validates: booking is upcoming, user is the coach, booking is confirmed
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use createBookingSystemMessage or similar from src/lib/conversations.ts. The conversation is between coachId and clientId.

userStories.title: Enforce 24h cancellation policy for clients
userStories.description: As a platform, I want to enforce that clients can only cancel up to 24 hours before the session. After that, they must message the coach.
acceptanceCriteria: In cancelClientSession action: if less than 24 hours before session, return error with message directing client to contact their coach
Update cancellation dialog UI to show different content based on time: if >24h show normal cancel button, if <24h show 'Contact Coach' button that links to messages
Coach can still cancel anytime (no change to coach cancellation)
Client cancellation dialog shows refund info: 100% if >48h, 50% if 24-48h, 'Contact coach' if <24h
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Client cancellation is in my-sessions/actions.ts cancelClientSession. Cancellation dialog is at src/components/sessions/cancellation-dialog.tsx. Refund logic in src/lib/refunds.ts.

userStories.title: Add availability overrides UI - block specific dates
userStories.description: As a coach, I want to block specific dates or date ranges from my schedule without changing my weekly availability.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Date Exceptions' section to availability page below the weekly schedule
Show a calendar where coach can click dates to toggle them blocked (red) or available (green)
Support selecting a date range by clicking start date then end date
Each blocked date creates a row in availabilityOverrides with isAvailable=false
Optional reason field per override (e.g. 'Vacation', 'Holiday')
Show list of current overrides with delete button
Create server actions: getAvailabilityOverrides, addAvailabilityOverride, deleteAvailabilityOverride
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: availabilityOverrides table already exists in schema.ts. Booking flow already checks overrides. Only the UI is missing.

userStories.title: Support multiple time slots per day in availability
userStories.description: As a coach, I want to set multiple available time ranges per day (e.g., 9-12 and 14-17, skipping lunch).
acceptanceCriteria: Change availability schema: coachAvailability can have multiple rows per coach+dayOfWeek
Add unique constraint on (coachId, dayOfWeek, startTime) instead of (coachId, dayOfWeek)
Update availability form to allow adding multiple time slots per day with + button
Each slot has its own start/end time and can be individually removed
Update saveAvailability action to handle multiple slots per day
Generate and run migration
Update booking flow slot generation to check all slots for a day (not just one)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This changes the data model. Currently 1 row per coach+day. Need to update getCoachAvailability, getRescheduleAvailableSlots, and booking slot generation to iterate over multiple slots per day.

userStories.title: Add coach-side client profile page
userStories.description: As a coach, I want a dedicated page to view a client's full history, notes, and action items.
acceptanceCriteria: Create /dashboard/clients/[clientId]/page.tsx
Show client info: name, avatar, email, member since
Show session history with this coach: list of all past/upcoming bookings
Show total sessions count, total hours coached together
Show action items assigned to this client by this coach
Show coach's private notes for each session (from session_notes table)
Add 'Message Client' button linking to conversation
Create server action getClientProfile(clientId) in a new clients/actions.ts
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Session notes are in session_notes table. Action items have coachId+clientId. Conversations have coachId+clientId.

userStories.title: Add clients list page for coaches
userStories.description: As a coach, I want to see a list of all my clients with key stats.
acceptanceCriteria: Create /dashboard/clients/page.tsx
List all unique clients who have booked with this coach
Show per client: avatar, name, email, total sessions, last session date, next upcoming session
Search by client name
Sort by: last session, total sessions, name
Each row links to /dashboard/clients/[clientId]
Add 'Clients' link to dashboard sidebar navigation
Create server action getCoachClients in clients/actions.ts
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Query distinct clientId from bookings where coachId matches. Join with users for name/avatar.

userStories.title: Add message labels and bookmarks
userStories.description: As a user, I want to label and bookmark conversations for better organization.
acceptanceCriteria: Add isBookmarked boolean column to conversations table (default false)
Add label text column to conversations table (nullable)
Add bookmark toggle icon on each conversation row in the list
Add label dropdown on each conversation (options: None, Important, Follow Up, Urgent)
Add filter buttons at top of conversations list: All, Bookmarked, by label
Create server actions: toggleBookmark, setConversationLabel
Generate and run migration for new columns
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Conversations table is in schema.ts. Conversation list component at src/components/messages/conversations-list.tsx.

userStories.title: Add unread reply indicator and sort by upcoming session
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see which conversations need replies and have the most urgent client at the top.
acceptanceCriteria: Conversations with unread messages where the last message is NOT from the current user show a 'Needs Reply' badge
For coaches: sort conversations by default with the client who has the nearest upcoming session first
Show next session date/time inline on each conversation row if one exists
Unread conversations float to top within the sort order
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: getConversations in messages/actions.ts returns conversation list. Need to join with bookings to get next upcoming session per client.

userStories.title: Add role switching for coaches
userStories.description: As a coach, I want to switch to client mode so I can also book sessions with other coaches.
acceptanceCriteria: Add role switcher component in the dashboard sidebar (only visible for users with role=coach)
Two modes: 'Coach Mode' and 'Client Mode'
In Coach Mode: show coach sidebar (Sessions, Clients, Availability, Payments, etc.)
In Client Mode: show client sidebar (My Sessions, Find a Coach, Action Items, etc.)
Store active mode in a cookie or localStorage (persists across page loads)
Dashboard page renders coach or client dashboard based on active mode
When in Client Mode, user can browse coaches and book sessions (self-booking already prevented)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Self-booking prevention already exists in book/confirm/actions.ts. Sidebar is at src/components/navigation/dashboard-sidebar.tsx. Dashboard page is at src/app/(dashboard)/dashboard/page.tsx.

userStories.title: Improve dashboard upcoming sessions clarity
userStories.description: As a user, I want the dashboard upcoming sessions to show dates clearly with urgency colors.
acceptanceCriteria: Upcoming sessions widget shows full date (e.g., 'Tuesday, Feb 4' not just 'in 2 hours')
Show both relative time AND absolute date/time
Apply urgency border colors (same as US-003)
Add Join button directly on the widget if meeting link exists
Empty state for coaches shows 'No upcoming sessions' with link to availability settings
Empty state for clients shows 'No upcoming sessions' with link to find a coach
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
